message:
style: apply clippy and rustfmt improvements

hook.rs:
- Use is_multiple_of() instead of % 2 == 0 for clarity
- Combine nested if-let statements with && syntax
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] to release_worker
- Rustfmt multiline formatting

api.rs:
- Combine nested if-let statements with && syntax
- Rustfmt line wrapping for timeout call

main.rs:
- Load daemon config early for queue settings
- Pass max_queue_depth to BuildHistory initialization
- Add fallback to defaults with warning on config load failure

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
